title: Inertia Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Inertia (LoadInertia As Integer, Eccentricity as Single)
parameters:
LoadInertia	Real expression that specifies total moment of inertia in kgm2 around the center of the end effector joint, including end effector and part.

Eccentricity	Real expression that specifies eccentricity in mm around the center of the end effector joint, including end effector and part.
description: Specifies the load inertia and eccentricity for the current robot.
see_also:
Weight

Inertia Example

VB Example:

m_spel.Inertia(0.02, 1.0)

C# Example:

m_spel.Inertia(0.02, 1.0);
